description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gradle:4.6-jdk8-alpine Docker image and sets GRADLE_USER_HOME to the repository’s .gradle directory in a before_script, and defines the GRADLE_OPTS variable as -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false. Define a single stage called test. Add ten jobs named test:t1 through test:t10, each running in the test stage, each with an except rule excluding branches@csui-advprog-2018/lab and an only rule matching the regex /.*tutorial[_-].*<n>$/ for its tutorial number. Each job executes the command gradle :tutorial-<n>:check; the test:t7 job also runs gradle :tutorial-7:jacocoTestReport as a second script line. Jobs test:t5, test:t6, test:t7, test:t8, and test:t10 publish the contents of /tutorial-<n>/build/* as artifacts.
